consistency.level_consistency: Level 10 is a significant tier for such a powerful ability, suggesting high-tier playability.

quality.clarity: The description is clear regarding the action economy, success mechanic (cleric level vs. percentile roll), and the outcome (GM-determined effect).
quality.flavor: Highly thematic for a Cleric, representing a direct appeal to their patron deity.
quality.completeness: All necessary mechanics (action cost, success chance, failure/success consequences, cooldown) are present.

mechanics.success_condition: Roll percentile dice <= Cleric Level (10% chance at level 10).
mechanics.effect: GM-determined effect, suggested to be equivalent to a Cleric/Domain spell.
mechanics.cooldown: 7 days upon success; Long Rest upon failure.
mechanics.scaling: Becomes an automatic success at 20th level, representing ultimate faith/divine favor.

suggestions: The 7-day cooldown upon success is very restrictive for a powerful, random effect. This balances the power but severely limits usage in long adventures or dungeons.
The 'great need' narrative trigger is slightly subjective, though standard for high-level features.
The automatic success at 20th level is an excellent capstone reward.
